stories.title: Stories
stories.subtitle: Create and manage multiple independent short dramas
stories.noStories: No stories yet. Click “New story” to begin.
stories.step1: Create a story or load the demo
stories.step2: Add characters / scenes / props (demo is prefilled)
stories.step3: Generate or export on the timeline (stub clips without a gateway)
stories.prototypeNote: Brief MVP is complete; commercial-grade film quality is still evolving.
stories.styleNotePlaceholder: e.g. rainy neon night, handheld camera, cool/warm contrast…

characters.title: Characters
characters.subtitle: Create characters independently; import soul.md as soul settings
characters.name: Name
characters.refHint: Reference images are uploaded to the gateway for character consistency.
characters.refMissing: No reference image — live generation may look inconsistent.

scenes.title: Scenes
scenes.subtitle: Create scenes and script fragments independently

timeline.title: Linear Timeline
timeline.subtitle: Reference characters, scenes, props & dialogue with precise duration control (AI video limits)
timeline.noEntries: Timeline is empty. Reference assets on the right and add clips.
timeline.dragHint: Drag onto the timeline, or click to append the next free slot.
timeline.previewEmpty: Select a timeline clip to preview
timeline.previewNoMedia: No playable media on this clip
timeline.aiClipHint: AI clips support 6 or 10 seconds only (snapped on generate)

pipeline.doneStub: Generation finished (includes stub color placeholders, not real AI video).
pipeline.doneFail: Generation failed. Check Settings or the gateway.
pipeline.confirmStub: This will use stub color placeholders (not real AI video). Continue?
pipeline.confirmHttp: This will call Gateway /v1/videos (needs agent/admin key). Continue?
pipeline.confirmAuto: Will auto-pick Gateway or stub. Continue?
pipeline.exportFallbackConfirm: Some clips are not READY; color fallbacks will be used. Export anyway?
pipeline.missingRefConfirm: These characters have no reference image: {{names}}. Continue?

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: AI video providers, export quality, and connectivity
settings.ttsEnabled: Try TTS for dialogue on export (optional)
settings.openExportFolder: Reveal export in folder after save
settings.packagedHint: Packaged builds need system ffmpeg; media and DB live under userData.
settings.gatewayHint: If offline, start the Grok gateway with videoApi + agent/admin key. See docs/grok-gateway.md

onboarding.body: This is a demoable prototype (MVP). Load the demo story and walk generate/export in about five minutes.
onboarding.progressNote: MVP scaffold is usable; full commercial film quality is still in progress.
